response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience as a senior software developer with a strong background in full-stack development, but his seniority and focus on advanced topics (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, low-latency systems) may overshoot the requirements for a junior/mid-level role. His technical skills align well with the job description, but his long tenure in senior/staff roles raises questions about fit for an entry-level position and on-site presence expectations.
strengths: Proven TypeScript and full-stack expertise with React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-relevant technologies.
Demonstrated interest in clean architecture and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective).
Strong learning ability and collaboration skills, evidenced by workshops and mentorship.
concerns: Overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 20+ years of experience in senior/staff positions.
Limited alignment with renewable energy/construction tech domain (focus on AI, GIS, and general web/mobile).
High on-site presence requirement may conflict with his established remote-friendly senior roles.
